verification_constraint: The planning preflight verified URL identity only; these references must not be represented as locator-level or claim-level verification.

references.title: Start by learning user needs
references.limitations: Does not validate any persona in this catalogue.

references.title: Writing user stories
references.limitations: Provides a method, not findings about GOV.UK users.

references.title: Assisted digital support: an introduction
references.limitations: Overlay relevance remains a hypothesis until research is authorised.

references.title: Understanding users who do not use digital services
Testing for accessibility
references.limitations: No human accessibility testing has been run for this bundle.

references.title: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2
references.limitations: Conformance is not claimed by citing the standard.

references.title: How we researched the new navigation on GOV.UK
references.evidence_quality: official research account; historical and locator verification pending
references.limitations: Historical research is not evidence of current user behaviour.

references.title: GOV.UK Content API
references.evidence_quality: official API; endpoint behaviour tested separately
references.limitations: Metadata discovery is not authoritative body-content retrieval.

references.title: GOV.UK Search API
references.evidence_quality: official API; parameter contract verification pending
references.limitations: Search results are not a complete historical corpus.

references.title: GOV.UK Taxonomy API
references.evidence_quality: official API family; detailed locator verification pending
references.limitations: The reference does not guarantee graph completeness.

references.title: GOV.UK collections and step-by-step content
references.evidence_quality: official API family; detailed locator verification pending
references.limitations: Ordering must be verified against a frozen corpus snapshot.

references.title: Model Context Protocol resources specification
references.limitations: The bundle does not claim MCP interoperability until tested.

references.title: KILT: a Benchmark for Knowledge Intensive Language Tasks
references.publisher: Facebook AI Research and academic collaborators
references.limitations: KILT scores are not directly comparable without a matched corpus and protocol.

references.title: BEIR: A Heterogeneous Benchmark for Zero-shot Evaluation of Information Retrieval Models
references.limitations: No BEIR benchmark result is claimed.

references.title: Practical Combinatorial Testing
references.publisher: US National Institute of Standards and Technology
